scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run electron:compile && npm run electron:build-server && npm run electron:build-client && npm run electron:prepare-puppeteer && npm run electron:rebuild-native && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build-quick: npm run electron:compile && npm run electron:build-server && npm run electron:build-client && electron-builder --mac
